user.description: Setup a Telenet or BASE Telemeter sensor. Select your provider, enter your username and password, and indicate if internet and/or mobile usage is to be tracked.

edit.description: Edit Telenet or BASE Telemeter sensor setup.

error.missing mobile: Please indicate if mobile usage is to be tracked
error.no_valid_settings: No valid settings, provide username, password, internet & mobile in ha config.
